class.name: GDKStore
class.description: Wraps XStore commerce APIs for [code]godot_gdk[/code] using completion [Signal] values and [GDKResult] payloads. All operations require a signed-in [GDKUser] and an initialized [GDK] runtime.

method.name: query_license_status_async
method.description: Queries whether the user can acquire a license for the specified Store product ID. The completion [Signal] emits a [GDKResult] whose [code]data[/code] is a [GDKStoreLicenseStatus] on success.

method.name: refresh_entitlements_async
method.description: Refreshes entitlements for the specified Store product ID by querying license-acquire status again.

method.name: show_purchase_ui_async
method.description: Shows the system purchase UI for the specified Store product ID.

method.name: show_product_page_ui_async
method.description: Shows the system product page UI for the specified Store product ID. The completion [Signal] emits a [GDKResult] whose [code]data.store_id[/code] echoes the requested product.

method.name: show_associated_products_ui_async
method.description: Shows the system associated-products UI for the specified Store product ID. [code]product_kinds[/code] is a comma-separated filter drawn from [code]consumable[/code], [code]durable[/code], [code]game[/code], [code]pass[/code], and [code]unmanaged_consumable[/code]; an empty string includes all kinds.

method.name: show_rate_and_review_ui_async
method.description: Shows the system rate-and-review UI for the current title. The completion [Signal] emits a [GDKResult] whose [code]data.was_updated[/code] reports whether the user submitted or changed a review.

method.name: show_redeem_token_ui_async
method.description: Shows the system token-redemption UI for the supplied 5x5 token or token string. [code]allowed_store_ids[/code] optionally restricts which products may be redeemed; [code]disallow_csv_redemption[/code] blocks redeeming as Store credit.

method.name: show_gifting_ui_async
method.description: Shows the system gifting UI for the specified Store product ID. [code]name[/code] and [code]extended_json[/code] are optional gifting metadata forwarded to the Store.

method.name: get_cached_license_status
method.description: Returns cached license status for a Store product ID, or [code]null[/code] when no cached value exists.

method.name: check_cached_license_status
method.description: Performs a synchronous cache-only license check. Returns [code]license_status_not_cached[/code] when no cached status exists.
